completed_packets.summary: Added a dependency-free dry-run planner for SFT, action SFT, DPO, SFT-then-DPO, reward-model, process-reward, GRPO, and RL training paths from registered model and dataset manifests. The planner blocks unknown licenses, unredacted traces, missing compatibility, missing mode views, and future RL modes without explicit enablement.
completed_packets.title: Plan agentic training paths from registered inputs

verification.summary: 21 focused tests passed, including agentic training plan behavior and schema catalog coverage.
Planner module, script, and tests compile successfully.
Schema catalog test passed with agentic_training_plan registered.

verification.command: python3 scripts/plan_agentic_training.py --mode sft_then_dpo ... --out /tmp/hfr-agentic-training-plan/plan.json && python3 -m flightrecorder schemas --check /tmp/hfr-agentic-training-plan/plan.json
verification.summary: Direct CLI smoke wrote a ready SFT-then-DPO plan from registered demo manifests and validated it against hfr.agentic_training_plan.v1.
Schema export wrote the agentic training plan schema and catalog manifest.

verification.command: python3 -m json.tool experiments/autonomy/supervisor_state.json && python3 -m json.tool flightrecorder/schemas/agentic_training_plan.v1.schema.json && git diff --check
verification.summary: State/schema JSON parse and whitespace checks passed.

completed_packets.summary: Published durable synthetic registered model/dataset manifests, schema-conforming trainer-view JSONL samples, and a reproducible SFT-then-DPO agentic training plan. Added trainer-preflight --agentic-training-plan support so ready plans are hashed, schema-checked, archived, archive-checked, and exposed to trainer consumer plans without launching trainers.
completed_packets.title: Publish schema-checked training plan artifacts

verification.summary: 38 tests passed, including full agentic-plan preflight/archive/consumer-plan coverage.

verification.command: python3 -m py_compile flightrecorder/agentic_training_plan.py flightrecorder/preflight.py flightrecorder/cli.py scripts/plan_agentic_training.py tests/test_agentic_training_plan.py tests/test_trainer_preflight.py
verification.summary: Touched planner, preflight, CLI, script, and tests compile.

verification.command: python3 -m flightrecorder schemas --check examples/agentic_training/plans/sft_then_dpo_plan.json and --check-jsonl for each sample trainer view
verification.summary: Committed plan plus SFT, action SFT, DPO, reward-model, step-reward, and episode sample views validate against bundled schemas.
Committed example plan regenerates cleanly with the fixed timestamp.

completed_packets.summary: Added a side-effect-free runtime preflight for ready agentic training plans. It validates selected trainer-view JSONL files against bundled schemas, checks backend or override Python module discoverability with importlib.util.find_spec, and emits ready_for_tiny_smoke_launch or block_tiny_smoke_launch without importing trainer stacks, downloading models, or launching training.
completed_packets.title: Resolve tiny smoke training runtime dependencies

verification.summary: 28 focused tests passed across runtime preflight, existing plan/preflight behavior, and schema catalog registration.

verification.command: python3 -m py_compile flightrecorder/agentic_training_runtime.py scripts/preflight_agentic_training_runtime.py tests/test_agentic_training_runtime.py flightrecorder/agentic_training_plan.py scripts/plan_agentic_training.py tests/test_agentic_training_plan.py
verification.summary: Runtime preflight module, script, tests, and adjacent planner files compile.
Ready CLI path emitted hfr.agentic_training_runtime_preflight.v1 with ready_for_tiny_smoke_launch and no training/model-download side effects.
Blocked CLI path exited 1, emitted block_tiny_smoke_launch, and classified the missing dependency.

verification.command: python3 -m flightrecorder schemas --check /tmp/hfr-agentic-runtime-preflight/ready.json && python3 -m flightrecorder schemas --check /tmp/hfr-agentic-runtime-preflight/blocked.json && python3 -m flightrecorder schemas --name agentic_training_runtime_preflight --write-dir /tmp/hfr-agentic-runtime-preflight/schema --force
verification.summary: Ready and blocked runtime-preflight artifacts validate, and the bundled schema exports through the registry.

verification.command: python3 -m json.tool flightrecorder/schemas/agentic_training_runtime_preflight.v1.schema.json && python3 -m json.tool flightrecorder/schemas/manifest.json && git diff --check
verification.summary: New runtime schema, schema manifest, and whitespace checks passed.
